# Ronan Keane

> AI Strategy & Implementation Consultant. I help SMB and mid-market B2B companies turn stalled AI initiatives into operational advantage.

## About

Twenty-plus years of B2B operations experience. Based in North Carolina, serves clients nationally. Background: GTT Communications, Vonage Business, Verizon. Focus areas: AI strategy, AI implementation, AI adoption, AI for revenue operations.

## Framework

PRIME — a structured approach to AI implementation:

- **P** — Potential Mapping & Assessment
- **R** — Roadmap & Strategy
- **I** — Implementation Planning
- **M** — Migration & Execution
- **E** — Enablement & Adoption

## Audience

SMB and mid-market B2B leaders: CEOs, Presidents, Founders, COOs, CROs, CMOs, VPs of Operations.

- Schedule a consultation: https://calendly.com/ronankeane/ai-revenue-acceleration-readiness-discovery-call
